item.text:
## Construct sites
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/agent_loop.rs`: constructs both variants in `AgentLoop::run` via `sink.emit(&LoopAuditEvent::ToolCallRequested { ... })` before tool dispatch and `sink.emit(&LoopAuditEvent::ToolCallResult { ... })` after dispatch/output capture.

Pattern-only references (excluded) appear in `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs` and `crates/orbit-engine/examples/v2_job_runtime_smoke.rs`.
